text:
How Do We Win?! | The Gotta Catch 'Em All! Game Show - Episode 4 Highlights
Trainers, did you see the fourth episode of our all-new live show, the Gotta Catch ’Em All! Game Show, hosted by @briandavidgilbert?  Episode 4 featuring @JackiJing,  @JaharaJaydeGames, and @IfyNwadiwe is now available on YouTube, be sure to check it out!

Follow us on Twitch and watch out for the next episode! https://www.twitch.tv/pokemon

#PokemonGameShow #GottaCatchEmAll #Pokemon

Find all your favorite Pokémon merchandise at the official Pokémon Center: https://www.pokemoncenter.com/
